_comment: Only the DATABASE connection can be seeded here (OPTIONAL). Admin account, object storage, and the release API key live IN THE DATABASE and are configured at /admin. With nothing set, the app boots and the dashboard drives setup.
_appReleaseComment: Metadata for the self-update check. The APK is hosted on GitHub Releases (not this backend). Bump versionCode + sha256 here when you publish a new APK; the app downloads downloadUrl and verifies sha256.
_appReleaseDeployWarning: BUILD 6 PENDING: Sha256 below is a PLACEHOLDER. Do NOT deploy until you replace it with the SHA-256 of the CI-published tv-video-hub.apk (a locally-built APK hashes differently — different keystore/JDK). An unmatched Sha256 makes the app reject the update (fail-closed: stays on the old version, never a bad install). Also set SizeBytes to the published file's size.

AppRelease.Notes: Caches each video as you watch so playback no longer pauses on a slow connection.
